All top-5 candidates re-confirmed with fresh occurrence increments. ADO notifications confirmed at 25 instances/week (25h/wk — highest single-week signal volume). builder-user-prototype surged RISING (+30.5h). candidateSkills.name: meeting-notes-action-extractor
candidateSkills.description: Ingests meeting transcript, agenda, or Loop doc; emits structured action items with owner/due-date, decisions log, follow-up email draft, and ADO task stubs. Chain head for transcript-to-loop and post-meeting-external-followup downstream. 349 occurrences across 70 unbroken cycles.
triggerExamples: Extract action items from today's Camp AIR standup and update the Loop doc
Summarize external customer meeting into Loop page with owners and due dates
Create standardized 1:1 notes template for all recurring meetings
Generate post-meeting recap broadcast from CAPE Architecture Call
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Replaces ~70.20 hrs across 4 roles. 349 occ over 70 cycles. Chain head for 2 downstream patterns. Est. ~$182,520/yr.

candidateSkills.name: ado-notification-router
candidateSkills.description: Classifies ADO notification emails by work-item type (Task, Requirement, Bug, Feature, Epic), workstream prefix, and urgency. Routes action-required to correct role; auto-archives FYI. DEEP SATURATION at 903 occ. Cycle 70 confirmed: 25 email notifications + 8 Teams triage threads = ~33h/wk manual processing. Highest automation score (95).
triggerExamples: Triage my ADO inbox — what needs action vs FYI?
Classify ADO notifications by workstream: IcM vs coverage vs AI Eval
Which Bug/Requirement notifications require PM response before EOD?
Route this Task notification to the correct DRI based on workstream prefix
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Eliminates ~34.34 hrs cumulative. 903 occ SATURATED. 25 notifications/day confirmed in cycle 70. Highest automation (95). Est. ~$89,284/yr.

candidateSkills.name: eval-report-synthesizer
candidateSkills.description: Ingests eval results, strategy discussions, actionability brainstorms, and customer donated evals. Produces standardized reports with gap analysis. RISING trend. 452 occurrences, 5 participants. Highest value score in catalog (95). EvalCon April 2 deadline amplifying urgency.
triggerExamples: Synthesize eval progress from CAPE leadership threads and customer donated evals discussion
Generate eval strategy and actionability analysis from Deep Technical Working Session notes
Prepare Golden Evals kickoff report from meeting transcript
Create eval strategy overview merging Teams threads and meeting artifacts
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Saves ~113.14 hrs across 5 roles. Highest value score (95). RISING. Est. ~$294,164/yr.

candidateSkills.name: eval-template-scaffolder
candidateSkills.description: Scaffolds eval framework templates, scenario libraries, and coverage models. Spawned customer-enablement-asset-standardization. 190 occurrences. STABLE across 67 cycles since first seen at cycle 3. EvalCon and Golden Evals sustaining demand.
triggerExamples: Generate an eval template for a 3-intent Copilot Studio agent
Scaffold a coverage model for BizChat offline evaluation
Create scenario library structure for Golden Evals framework
Build eval coverage matrix for SEVAL agent quality assessment
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Saves ~56.46 hrs across 4 roles. 190 occ STABLE. Spawns customer enablement. Est. ~$146,796/yr.

candidateSkills.name: weekly-status-report-generator
candidateSkills.description: Generates standardized weekly status reports from Loop docs, Teams threads, email updates, and meeting notes. Resolves 5-format parallel creation gap. RISING trend. 157 occurrences, 4 participants. V-Team Cross-Org Syncs and EvalCon confirmed as primary triggers in cycle 70.
triggerExamples: Generate this week's CAPE eval status merging all sources
Draft unified XFN Report Out from parallel Teams posts this week
Create EOD debrief template for Camp AIR daily standup follow-up
Refresh weekly status from Loop doc, Teams, and email summaries
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Saves ~44.14 hrs across 4 roles. 157 occ RISING. 5 parallel formats. Est. ~$114,764/yr.
